violations.text: Customers with a non-service animal were observed in the dining area. Customers left with animal before PIC was notified by inspectors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Bar utensils in the bar prep area are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Cardboard is used in the construction of shelf liners in the beverage walk-in cooler. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
Menu board and/or order station does not have an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (plates) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed items in dishwasher to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was >400 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quaternary ammonia sanitizer is 200 ppm. PIC emptied buckets. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Inspector observed staff drying dishes with a cloth. PIC notified. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
The following hand sinks need proper handwashing signage: -both bar hand sinks, -both family bathrooms, -employee bathroom. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (bar ice chests and ice machines) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
